entries.description: Registered S1 (claude/anthropic/claude-fable-5); read spec, module-lifecycle verdict, Set 093 spec (amendment-4 tree being reversed), Set 098 change-log (kind field + scaffold writer outcome). Prereqs 098+099 confirmed complete.

Confirmed prereqs 098+099 complete + Creates present (kind field, scaffold writer, rename/delete writers); appended ai-assignment.md; routed Session-2 recommendation (gemini-pro, \.0022) -> claude/anthropic/sonnet-5/low saved to s1-next-set-analysis.json.

Dropped plan/sessionSets child-state fields from ModulePayload + deriveModuleChildren/ModulePlanState/ModuleSessionSetsState + the planExists plumbing (host stamping map, mergeVisibleModules OR-combines, VisibleModule field); added kindBadge/kindTooltip pure model functions + RowPayload fields; buildRow ships them.

client.js: removed renderPlanNode/renderSessionSetsNode/sessionSetsStateText + child-header wiring; buckets render as module's direct children (module aria-level 1, bucket 2, row 3); kind chip span after row name; tree.css child-node styles removed, 24px indents restored, .row-kind-badge chip added.

Layer 2: moduleTier source scans rewritten to the 3-level contract + kind-chip pins; visibleModules 093 suites replaced with flattened-payload pins; compat-matrix row + rule updated with the renamed test (L-065-1 echo pass). New moduleLifecycleUi.test.ts: kind badge model fns, scan->badge e2e incl. warn-and-degrade, state matrix (no sets/kind-only/mixed/pseudo/fallback), scaffolded-decomposition blocked marker + unblock-on-plan-complete, host wiring scan. Layer 3: module-tier + session-sets-tree pins moved to 3 levels; kind-chip pin added. Targeted suites 102 pass.
Operator answered the UAT/E2E suggested-state prompt: both.

tsc clean; esbuild clean; eslint 7 pre-existing errors (untouched files, standing baseline); unit suite (vscode-stub path) 1588 pass; Playwright Layer 3 local per L-064-12: 25/26 then 26/26 after correcting this session's own new bucket-key assertion (pointed at an empty leaf bucket; zero product defects); ai_router pytest 3030 pass / 6 skip (unchanged baseline, no Python touched). suggestion_disposition: both recorded; S1 UAT checklist (3 walks, 078/087-S3 bar) compiled; 093 S1 walks noted superseded.

Phased discovery round 1 (K=2 fan-out, both gpt-5-6; anthropic excluded): VERIFIED / VERIFIED, 0 blocking, \.3172 total. Two nits folded in: (1) UAT Walk 2 focus-click also collapses the module - walk rewritten to acknowledge the toggle + ArrowRight re-expand; (2) blocked-tooltip test upgraded from includes() to strictEqual so the UAT-quoted wording is contractually pinned. moduleLifecycleUi suite re-run green; checklist JSON re-validated. Minor-only -> loop closed, no supplementary/remediation phase.

Registered session 2 via start_session; read spec, S1 outcome (ai-assignment.md), Set 093 S2 targeting-seam architecture doc, Set 098/099 change-logs (scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets, renameModule, deleteModule writer contracts).

Reworked the module action strip (client.js) and context menu (CustomSessionSetsView.showModuleContextMenu): Open Plan survives; AI Plan/Import Plan/AI Sets retired from both surfaces (palette commands unchanged); Add module/Rename module.../Delete module... join, declared-modules-only (pseudo keeps Assign... and gets no management actions). Protocol (ModuleActionId) and moduleActionNarrowing.ts updated to match, with a declared-only gate for the three new actions.

Threaded rename/delete through the explicit module-target seam: runRenameModuleFlow/runDeleteModuleFlow gained an opts.preselectedSlug that skips pickModule entirely (fails loud on a stale slug, mirroring pickModuleForAuthoring D1); row/context dispatch (moduleActionExec) passes the narrowed slug, palette commands (dabbler.renameModule/dabbler.deleteModule) keep their own QuickPick unchanged.

Extended runNewModuleFlow (newModule.ts) to call scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets after the manifest append; a writer refusal reports in the same info toast and leaves the manifest append intact (module without sets beats half-written sets).

Updated/added tests: moduleActionNarrowing.test.ts (declared-only gating, retired-action drop, dispatch wiring for the 3 new actions), renameModule.test.ts + deleteModule.test.ts (preselectedSlug targeting-parity + stale-slug fail-loud + palette still QuickPicks), moduleAuthoring.test.ts (runNewModuleFlow lifecycle-scaffold happy path, skip-existing re-run, scaffold-refusal-keeps-module-declared), moduleLifecycleUi.test.ts (host/client source-scan pinning retired actions absent + new actions present + declared-only gate + moduleActionExec wiring). Playwright module-tier.spec.ts strip counts/actions updated (declared=4 incl. new actions, pseudo=2 incl. only Open Plan + Assign). Full unit suite green: 1605 passing (was 1588 after S1).

Live dogfood on a scratch multi-module repo running the REAL compiled writers exactly as moduleActionExec binds them: add module greeter (scaffoldNewModule + scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets -> plan set ready, decomposition set blocked on the plan), rename greeter->welcomer (zero orphans, both lifecycle sets restamped), delete welcomer (manifest entry gone, both unstarted scaffolds removed outright per the Set 099 disposition rule). Full Class1 loop PASS; raw output saved at s2-dogfood.md.

tsc --noEmit clean; eslint: 7 pre-existing errors in untouched test files (standing baseline, none in files this session touched); esbuild compile clean. Full extension unit suite (vscode-stub mocha path): 1605 passing / 0 failing (up from 1588 after S1, +17 new tests this session). Layer 3 Playwright full run locally (L-064-12, this session changes Explorer-rendering surfaces): 26/26 passing. ai_router pytest: 3030 passed / 6 skipped - the standing baseline, unchanged (zero ai_router/ code files touched this session).

Cross-provider phased discovery round 1 (fan-out K=2, both gpt-5-6, openai - anthropic orchestrator provider excluded): VERIFIED on both calls, zero blocking findings. Each call independently raised the same 4 evidence/test-precision nits (dogfood wording overclaimed multi-module + moduleActionExec-exact-path; a test named skip-existing actually tested cross-module coexistence; the Add-module numbering test asserted only a digit pattern, not exact numbers) plus one real defensive-code nit (newModule.ts silently suppressed the scaffold-refusal report on a failed post-append manifest re-read, an async-race window opened by awaiting ui.openFile before the re-read). All five folded in: dogfood script + s2-dogfood.md rewritten to seed a genuinely untouched second module (payments) and accurately describe the writer-level (not moduleActionExec-level) exercise; the misleadingly-named test renamed to state what it actually verifies (cross-module coexistence during a later Add); the numbering test tightened to assert the exact 001-greeter-plan/002-greeter-decomposition slugs; newModule.ts now constructs the just-appended ModuleManifestEntry directly instead of re-reading the manifest after the async ui.openFile() call, removing the race and the silent-skip path entirely. Re-ran clean: tsc --noEmit clean, unit suite 1605/1605 unchanged, dogfood re-run PASS with real multi-module isolation held throughout every step. No second verification round needed (nits-only, non-blocking per the loop discipline).
